known_open_gates: Production activation requires a fresh readiness report bound to the concrete resident identity and Body fingerprint.
Neither role has issued a fresh target-bound authenticated APPROVED production-fusion decision.

operator.authority_basis: The operator requested completion and publication of the software release; that instruction is not a signed target-bound production-fusion approval.
approved_scope: dormant fusion infrastructure and offline acceptance tests
excluded_scope: production MIND fusion without authenticated target-bound approval
operator.reason: The software is technically ready; no concrete resident-bound signed fusion approval was supplied.

guardian.decision_basis: Body-before-MIND, host preservation, containment, technical readiness, and independent explicit authority.
approved_scope: software publication with MIND dormant by default
required_before_production_fusion: Fresh 14/14 addon and 90/90 framework Stage-1 evidence on the target resident.
A READY report bound to the target Body fingerprint.
A new operator signature from the configured operator credential.
A separate guardian signature from the configured guardian credential.
guardian.reason: Release is safe because fusion remains dormant and fail-closed; production activation remains separately gated.

effective_decision.next_permitted_action: Publish after clean-checkout release verification; keep production fusion dormant.
effective_decision.fusion_rule: Fusion requires fresh target-bound evidence plus separate authenticated APPROVED records from operator and guardian. Release approval cannot substitute for either signature. Silence, continuation, technical certification, and READY cannot substitute either.
